name: Luna
author: avatar-forge
notes: Design = soft-goth: platinum-white hair (#E9E7F2), amethyst eyes (#7B4FA6), dark velvet dress (#171019). Recolors the base's Hair/Iris/Outfit materials (PBR + MToon shade). springProfile 'natural' = fluid hair/skirt. Bespoke hair/outfit GEOMETRY needs a base that already has those meshes (your VRoid export) — see ROADMAP.
